evidence.quote: Every day he would show up to our standup and he said, "Yeah, I'm doing outbound and I'm really working on that deal with Vercel and nothing would close."
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: We just don't want 200 reps running around Vercel or Replit that don't know what the product does.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: The fact that Vercel just added Janine means they're going more enterprise by definition.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: I've talked about that we should have $250,000 a year SDRs, but they'd be like at Vercel, they'd be managing 10 agents, not 10 people.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: Palantir
entities.how_described: 本集说它是目前最成功的上市 B2B 公司之一。它因为拥有前线部署工程师并在现场把产品跑通的模式，实现了九位数规模的交易。

evidence.quote: I think Palantir is obviously the single most successful public B2B company at the moment.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: He's like, "The number one thing I envy in Palantir, one is their high deal sizes."
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: 智能体 (agent)
entities.how_described: 本集说它能自主执行销售和客服任务，并24/7全天候工作。但它们无法开箱即用，必须经过摄取数据、每日纠错和长达30天的训练才能成功。

evidence.quote: Agent Force needs a nickname.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: The interesting thing, the aha moment that happened to us is going into May of this year, we had one AI agent in production called Delphi that we both use for digital lending and Digital Jason.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: And I knew from this Delphi, this general agent that it would sort of work because going into annual, this general agent, this Digital Jason closed a 70K sponsorship on its own.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: So when I saw that a horizontal agent, not trained for sales, not trained for GTM could close one deal, they're like, "Let's deploy a couple of these apps.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: But when you dial them in, when you take your best person or your best script and you train an agent with your best person and best script, that agent can start to become a version of your best salesperson, your best person.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: And then, we have a different agent to get people to come back, lapse people.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: Our AI alone, one of our agent fully qualifies everybody on the website, so they don't even know they're being qualified and just sets up the meeting with the salesperson.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: I don't think there's any reason what we're seeing in other categories, a great agent can't close a deal too.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: If there's not a lot to negotiate on price and the agent knows the product better than a human, at least for folks like you and me, I mean, do you like to talk to a human in sales?
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: So the folks that know how to manage an agent, work with an agent, the folks that know their product for real, they're going to become more valuable and the rest are going to become less valuable.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: Pick a tool, an agent, an agentic tool to solve one of your problems.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: Train the agent, ingest the data, do the iterations, understand how this damn thing works.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: So they thought they could take an untrained agent with no training and just magically give it to a bunch of young 20-year-old SDRs and this magically would sell on its own.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: And you will learn the limits and you will learn the agent can... what it can do and where it can't do.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: And the agent just started doing support on its own.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: And this is an agent that is emailing with prospect selling them on a sponsorship.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: But the key to the first two, and if you're going to pick an agent, is they offered to help the most.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: I bet if you spooled up an agent and emailed all those folks back automatically, you'd fill up the docket, right?
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: And so just be aware, if you're a startup or even Salesforce or HubSpot, maybe close those deals in the next 12 months, because the window may close where people say, "Listen, that's the coolest agent I've ever seen.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: What you do is an agent will be successful in go-to-market and sales today if you take what works for your best person, train... I know this seems like a scary term, but it's not.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: Train the agent on it and let it iterate an A/B test from that.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: That's all the agent has to do is take your best email you ever sent and stick it through an API.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: You just haven't seen a well-trained agent.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: And so now, just instead of humans, there's an agent doing each of these jobs.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: They have this outbound agent that's just sending emails, trying to find potential leads.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: An inbound agent that's talking to people that are interested, trying to get them more excited.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: And then is there an AE agent or... I forget how that works.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: I don't know that if your average SDR or junior salesperson is going to get budget for their own agent.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: Whatever tools your organization is using, become the best person at working with that agent and you'll automatically get more efficient.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: Is it annoying that you walk into work and the agent set up four calls for you and maybe you only wanted to do two of them?
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: For the managers, buy an agent, deploy it yourself.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: I think what's different today is the agent will fail without training and onboarding this product.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: This term's been bandied about too much, but you need a team of humans, we can call them forward deployed engineers that make 100% sure that when the agent is turned on, it's awesome.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: And it's a fancy name for a bunch of folks on your team that when it goes live, the AI agent actually works.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: When you expect the agent to work during the pilot before the big check comes, people person is insufficient.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: Tell me the person that's going to launch my agent, train it and get into production for me before I even pay you.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: So if you get great at this stuff, if you go buy an agent today, when you listen to this and deploy it yourself and do the hard work and train it and ingest it and iterate it every day and get ahead of it and then get two agents and then three and then four, you may become more valuable, have a better experience in ETM.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: So, when I have an issue and I'm trying to figure out how to do something, the agent calls in an architect or another agent and they debate and argue with it and they come up with the right answer.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: Pick the thing that makes you cry the most over your mold wine and go buy that agent and fix it.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: What you're saying here is no, find an agent to take care of this in the future, make this a much better experience for everyone always.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: I'm going to bring in this agent, this sales agent or this support agent.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: 前线部署工程师 (Forward Deployed Engineer)
entities.how_described: 本集说它是供应商派去客户现场的技术人员。这是决定智能体选型的关键：好的供应商会派他们手把手帮客户把模型调通、在付款前就出业绩，而不是直接卖空壳软件。

evidence.quote: So first you upload a bunch of your stuff, then you spend hours training it, often with the help of a vendor, someone called the Forward Deployed Engineer, which is a scary term, it means someone's going to help you do this.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: You've got to do another column, which is your Forward Deployed Engineer or solution architect or your SE and talk to them and say, "Who is going to help me?"
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: For founders in startups, what I'm hearing is be that forward deployed engineer, have that person, that sales engineer that's sitting there helping companies.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: So we have a forward deployed engineer.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: SDR

evidence.quote: The classic SDR junior kid that is hired out of college to send emails, we don't need them.

evidence.quote: Imagine you hired a 21-year-old SDR fresh out of junior college and said, here's my list, 1.2 million people, start calling them.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: The email-based cadence SDR will be 90% displaced by AI next year.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: So this email-based SDR and this human qualifying leads, which is not good for the customer.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: It could be support, it could be SDR, it could be inbound qualification.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: And we did a call with their team and they're like, "We want to figure out this AI SDR stuff."
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: And every day when that AI SDR sends out emails and do practice emails, they will say some dumb things.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: Then we did SDR for outbound, then we did inbound, and then we did Agentforce really early with Salesforce.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: No SDR, BDRs.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: I don't know that if your average SDR or junior salesperson is going to get budget for their own agent.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: Now everyone in the world wants to build an AI, SDR, AIR, CRM.

entities.name: AE
entities.how_described: 本集说这种负责真正成交的客户经理，明年大概 70% 的工作还是安全的，但再往后会降到只有 40% 到 50% 安全，仅仅“会搞关系”将不再是护城河。
